overview: A no-login, open-on-load AI workspace with chat, tools, internet search, documents, and a browsable activity log — all on one page with per-browser session persistence.
features: Open directly into the AI workspace with no login or landing page
AI chat with streaming responses, multiple chats, folders, and history
8 inline tools (QR, password, UUID, Base64, JSON, Markdown, text case, timestamp)
Internet search with inline results and search history
Document creation and editing with file uploads
Browsable Activity Log panel showing all chats, tools, searches, and actions
Per-browser anonymous session persistence — data survives reloads
Single-page workspace with no redirects between features
